nstructional Clusters Cluster Management Tools ------------------------ These are cluster management tools that we have deployed or considered for classes on the Instructional Linux systems. Kubernetes (http://kubernetes.io/) Mesos (http

.adaptivecomputing.com/products/open-source/maui/) Instructors: please contact inst@eecs.berkeley.edu as soon as possible if you are considering these for your class. Previous Instructional Clusters ------------------------------- For d

Clusters ------------------------------- For documentation about our previous clusters, please see /share/b/pub/icluster.help (MapRAeduce/Hadoop on local servers) /share/b/pub/ccluster.help (MapRAeduce/Hadoop on an IBM cluster) EECS
